first_paragraph: **The Most Illustrious Order of Paduka Laila Jasa Keberanian Gemilang**[[1]](#cite_note-1) ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Darjah Paduka Laila Jasa Keberanian Gemilang Yang Amat Cemerlang*), also translated as **The Most Illustrious Order of Splendid Valour**,[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2) is an [order](/wiki/Order_(decoration) "Order (decoration)") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei"). It was established on 1 August 1968 by [Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah "Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah").[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

| Order of Paduka Laila Jasa Keberanian Gemilang | |
| --- | --- |
| Awarded by the [Sultan of Brunei](/wiki/Sultan_of_Brunei "Sultan of Brunei") | |
| Type | [Military decoration](/wiki/Military_decoration "Military decoration") |
| Established | 1968 |
| Country | [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei") |
| Awarded for | For acts of military gallantry |
| Status | Currently constituted |
| Sovereign | [Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Hassanal_Bolkiah "Hassanal Bolkiah") |
| Grades | * First Class (DPKG) * Second Class (DLKG) * Third Class (DKG) |
| Precedence | |
| Next (higher) | [Order of Islam Brunei](/wiki/Order_of_Islam_Brunei "Order of Islam Brunei") |
| Next (lower) | [Order of Paduka Keberanian Laila Terbilang](/wiki/Order_of_Paduka_Keberanian_Laila_Terbilang "Order of Paduka Keberanian Laila Terbilang") |
|  | |

**The Most Illustrious Order of Paduka Laila Jasa Keberanian Gemilang**[[1]](#cite_note-1) ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Darjah Paduka Laila Jasa Keberanian Gemilang Yang Amat Cemerlang*), also translated as **The Most Illustrious Order of Splendid Valour**,[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2) is an [order](/wiki/Order_(decoration) "Order (decoration)") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei"). It was established on 1 August 1968 by [Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah "Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah").[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)

## Current classes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Order_of_Paduka_Laila_Jasa_Keberanian_Gemilang&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Current classes")]

The three classes of appointment to the Order are, from highest grade to lowest grade:

| Class | [Post-nominal](/wiki/Post-nominal_letters "Post-nominal letters") | [Title](/wiki/Malay_styles_and_titles "Malay styles and titles") | [Ribbon bar](/wiki/Ribbon_bar "Ribbon bar") |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| First Class | DPKG | Dato Paduka Seri |  |
| Second Class | DLKG | Dato Laila |  |
| Third Class | DKG | – |  |

## Recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Order_of_Paduka_Laila_Jasa_Keberanian_Gemilang&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Recipients")]

### First Class

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Order_of_Paduka_Laila_Jasa_Keberanian_Gemilang&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: First Class")]

* Unknown – [Omar Ali Saifuddien III](/wiki/Omar_Ali_Saifuddien_III "Omar Ali Saifuddien III") – [Sultan of Brunei](/wiki/List_of_sultans_of_Brunei "List of sultans of Brunei")[[3]](#cite_note-:1-3)
* Unknown – [Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Hassanal_Bolkiah "Hassanal Bolkiah") – Sultan of Brunei[[3]](#cite_note-:1-3)

### Third Class

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Order_of_Paduka_Laila_Jasa_Keberanian_Gemilang&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Third Class")]

* Unknown – [John Simpson](/wiki/John_Simpson_(British_Army_officer) "John Simpson (British Army officer)") – Commander of the [Royal Brunei Malay Regiment](/wiki/Royal_Brunei_Malay_Regiment "Royal Brunei Malay Regiment")[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* Unknown – B. F. L. Rooney – Commander of the Royal Brunei Malay Regiment[[5]](#cite_note-5)
